sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53363" key="karkinoba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρκῐνο-βάτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walking like a crab</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0420.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristonym.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> (sed leg.</sense> </entryFree>
